args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class, types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Context, HonoRequest), and client inference types (InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
- Internal names noticed: Hono (imported from ./hono), BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, StatusCode, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports the Hono framework class and its associated types for public consumption
- Copy-safe detail: Module exports Hono class and type definitions from context, request, client, and types modules

## src/types.ts

- Public surface: Defines Env, Variables, Bindings, Input, Next, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundResponse, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, ValidationTargets, and various utility types
- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, BlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, ExtractParams, ParamKeys, ParamKeyToRecord, ExtractSchema, FetchEventLike
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for handlers, routes, middleware, validation targets, typed responses, and schema extraction utilities
- Copy-safe detail: Contains interfaces and type aliases for all core handler patterns including 10+ handler combinations, middleware patterns, and on() method overloads

## src/hono.ts

- Public surface: Hono class constructor accepting options (router, getPath, strict), extending HonoBase
- Internal names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Router
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing with SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
- Copy-safe detail: Constructor initializes router with smart router fallback strategy for route matching

## src/hono-base.ts

- Public surface: Router and routing methods (get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use), mount, route, basePath, onError, notFound, fetch, request, fire, errorHandler, notFoundHandler
- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, HonoOptions, GetPath, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, basePath
- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./http-exception
- Plain-English summary: Base implementation containing routing logic, request dispatch, middleware composition, error handling, and helper methods for app construction
- Copy-safe detail: Implements handler interface methods, mount support, error/notFound handlers, router integration, and HEAD request handling for GET equivalence

## src/context.ts

- Public surface: Context class with methods req, event, executionCtx, res, render, setLayout, getLayout, setRenderer, header, status, set, get, var, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, newResponse
- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, ExecutionContext, FetchEventLike, Data, Renderer, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, DefaultRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, TextRespond, ResponseOrInit, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/headers, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types, ./http-exception, ./utils/body, ./request/constants
- Plain-English summary: Request context holding state for handlers including env bindings, variables, response, headers, status, layout renderer, and response helpers
- Copy-safe detail: Manages request lifecycle, response creation with typed methods (text/json/html), variable storage, rendering with layouts, and redirect/notFound handling

## src/request.ts

- Public surface: HonoRequest class with methods param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, addValidatedData, valid, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath, plus cloneRawRequest utility
- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Input, ValidationTargets, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, InputToDataByTarget, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, parseBody, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, Body, BodyCache, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData
- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./utils/url
- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing typed access to URL params, query strings, headers, and body parsing for multiple content types
- Copy-safe detail: Caches parsed body content to enable safe cloning, supports multipart/form-data and x-www-form-urlencoded parsing, includes validation target access

## src/request/constants.ts

- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol exported for internal request matching
- Internal names noticed: none
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export used internally to identify request matching results on HonoRequest instances
- Copy-safe detail: Symbol used as property accessor for retrieving matched route result from HonoRequest

## src/utils/body.ts

- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions (all, dot), BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue
- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ../utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Parses form data and multipart bodies with configurable options for array handling and dot notation nesting
- Copy-safe detail: Supports all=true for array values, dot=true for nested objects, handles __proto__ attacks defensively

## src/compose.ts

- Public surface: compose function accepting middleware array, errorHandler, onNotFound handler
- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types, ./utils/constants
- Plain-English English summary: Middleware composition based on koa-compose pattern, dispatches handlers in order with error and notFound fallback
- Copy-safe detail: Tracks index to prevent multiple next() calls, passes error to errorHandler when thrown, handles context finalization

## src/http-exception.ts

- Public surface: HTTPException class with res, status properties, getResponse() method
- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Exception class for returning HTTP responses with custom status codes, used for auth failures and validation errors
- Copy-safe detail: Accepts optional Response for immediate reuse or message for new response, includes getResponse() to materialize response object

## src/client/index.ts

- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, parseResponse, DetailedError, fetchRP
- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
- Plain-English summary: HTTP client module providing hc() shortcut for typed API clients and parseResponse for result inference
- Copy-safe detail: Creates proxy-based client construction, infers types from endpoints and responses, wraps parseResponse from client/fetch-result-please

## src/client/client.ts

- Public surface: hc client builder function, ClientRequestImpl, Client type, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
- Internal names nowhere seen: ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, createProxy, proxyCallback, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, HonoURL, TypedURL, BuildPath, BuildPathname, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, Response, Fetch, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, InferEndpointType, InferRequestOptionsType, PathToChain, ExpandAllMethod, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types, ./types, ./utils
- Plain-English summary: Typed HTTP client implementation using proxy pattern to build URL paths, query params, and request bodies with full type inference
- Copy-safe detail: Supports $get/$post etc. methods, parameterized paths, query strings, body (json/form), cookies, headers, websockets, url/path preview methods

## src/client/types.ts

- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, BuildSearchParamsFn, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, TypedURL, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, InferEndpointType, InferRequestOptionsType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse
- Internal names nowhere seen: Endpoint, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Schema, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, HasRequiredKeys, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, BuildPathname, HonoURL, Response, Fetch, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, InferEndpointType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, PickRoute, PickSchema
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for the HTTP client including endpoint schemas, request/response types, URL building, type inference, and status code filtering
- Copy-safe detail: Expands $all to all HTTP methods, builds URLs from base + path + params + query, infers request/response types from endpoints, filters responses by status code

## src/client/utils.ts

- Public surface: parseResponse function, DetailedError, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
- Internal names nowhere seen: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode
- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for client operations including URL manipulation, query building, deep merging, and response parsing
- Copy-safe detail: mergePath removes trailing/leading slashes, replaceUrlParam handles pattern replacement, buildSearchParams creates URLSearchParams, deepMerge recursively merges objects, parseResponse infers type and throws DetailedError on non-ok status

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts

- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
- Internal names nowhere seen: nullBodyResponses
- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Response parsing utility that auto-detects JSON/text based on content-type and throws DetailedError for non-OK responses
- Copy-safe detail: Detects JSON by content-type regex, skips body for 101/204/205/304 status codes, parses response based on detected type, DetailedError includes detail/code/statusCode/log fields

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts

- Public surface: fire function, handle function
- Internal names nowhere seen: FetchEvent, FetchEventLike, HandleOptions
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./handler, ./handler.ts
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that registers Hono app to handle fetch events using addEventListener
- Copy-safe detail: Sets up 'fetch' event listener with handle() wrapping, passes execution context to app.fetch, deprecated use of original fire method exists

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts

- Public surface: handle function with FetchEvent and HandleOptions
- Internal names nowhere seen: FetchEvent, FetchEventLike, FetchOptions, HandleOptions
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./handler, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Handler factory that wraps Hono app.fetch for Service Worker contexts, binds fetch to globalThis, handles 404 by falling back to standalone fetch
- Copy-safe detail: Wraps app.fetch with async Promise, passes execution context, binds fetch to globalThis for sw context, falls back to standalone fetch on 404

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

- Public surface: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent interface
- Internal names nowhere seen: ExtendableEvent, Event, Promise, any
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for Service Worker FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent with service-specific properties
- Copy-safe detail: Extends Event with clientId, handled Promise, preloadResponse Promise, request, resultingClientId, respondWith, waitUntil, passThroughOnException

## Path Inventory

- src/index.ts
- src/types.ts
- src/hono.ts
- src/hono-base.ts
- src/context.ts
- src/request.ts
- src/request/constants.ts
- src/utils/body.ts
- src/compose.ts
- src/http-exception.ts
- src/client/index.ts
- src/client/client.ts
- src/client/types.ts
- src/client/utils.ts
- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
